Eckhart Security has been granted the bounty for the immediate capture of all high-level gang members: Maltrox Arlington, Kass Dent, Nicks Cantwell,  Sam ‘Weepy’ Arlington, Oslo Arlington, and Les Arlington.

description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Ship Ambush
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

We’re looking for contractors with combat experience who are willing to get their hands dirty so to speak. A client of ours was double-crossed by a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> and we’ve been waiting for an opportunity to deal with the issue. After tracking them for several weeks, we’ve identified <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> as the ideal spot to intercept them. It features an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> where you can hide and power down your ship while waiting for the <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4>.

Intel suggests that they may travel with an escort. If they do, you’ll have to deal with them too. Since this is your first contract, we will have other contractors in the area who can lend a hand once you strike.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. There’s a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> in this for the main contractor too.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
name: ContractGenerator.EckhartSecurity ShipAmbush

title: PURGE ASD SERVERS
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Destroy Server
APPROVAL CODE = VS-14

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A client has asked us to infiltrate an old ASD research site and wipe the contents of a few specific servers there.

We believe the servers are located somewhere within the <EM4>Xenotech Lab, in the Research wing</EM4>. The client has also informed us that despite the facilities being publicly declared as closed, you're still likely to find hostile forces there.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

title: Save Ship
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Ship
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A client is reporting trouble near <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Based on their comms, it doesn’t sound like an organized, professional attack. Still, we’re paid to provide protection and it’s been requested. 

Need a contractor to fly there and secure the situation.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

title: Security Contractor Reevaluation
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Trial - Defend Location
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Eckhart Security is continuing to evaluate potential new contractors. According to our records, you’ve previously attempted a trial contract. We understand how demanding and unpredictable this line of work can be, and would like to give you another chance at completing a qualifying contract. 

If interested, report to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> ready to defend it from an incoming assault by outlaws. Successfully complete this contract to receive payment and more work opportunities from Eckhart Security.

This contract is non-negotiable.

title: Yellow Level Contract: Clear Shipjacking Group
description:
There's a small group of criminals that have been marking their territory, striking out any freighters that get close enough. They got a little too greedy though, because now someone's paying us to go deal with them.

Once you and whoever you're bringing are ready, go to ~mission(Location|Address) and engage with these criminals. Since they like to fly in separate packs, be sure you wait around to clear every last one of them out.
 
Good luck,

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: Yellow Level Contract: Limiting Potential Threat
description:
A bunch of outlaws have been harassing our client and recently things have taken a turn for the worse. They've taken over their property and we've exhausted all other options.

We need a decent pilot to head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and take out their fuel tanks. If you can cut off their supplies, you can pave the way for the client to take back their property.

This shouldn't be a tough one. You might run into a ship or two and maybe a few turrets, but you've been authorized to use lethal force. All we need for you to do is get in there, get the fuel tanks, and get out.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

description:

Bring the cargo to the freight elevator at ~mission(Destination|Address) and I’ll get you your creds.

Make sure you got a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> on you too, no idea how big or small that cargo is.

Stows out.

title: Hauling ask.
description:
You been doing good work for us, so I got a favor to ask. I'll still pay you, but it's a favor. Got some cargo that needs to get bounced from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and the guy that was supposed to do it found himself on the wrong side of an airlock, but hey, shit still needs to get done.

Only thing is you'll need a ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.  A <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> would also be smart to bring along. 

If you could sort it out for me, that'd be great.

- Stows out

title: Help Headhunters Prospect
description:
Guess some folks just can’t dogfight. Sent a young prospect out on patrol, and am now being barraged with comms about how they’re barely hanging on. Had them update me with the details about who they’re up against and I damn near fell outta my chair laughing.    

If this kid can’t handle a People’s Alliance ship, they sure ain’t ready for flight assignments. Appreciate it if you could save their hide anyway.

If you’re free, could you head over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and show ‘em how it’s done?

title: Kopion Culling Request
description:
We’ve recently received reports from our team in <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, that a particularly virile pack of kopions are causing a surge in numbers. As a result, their prey is being over hunted, and if left unattended, will ultimately lead to the starvation of the kopion population there.

We are looking for a skilled contractor to cull this pack of kopions in a swift and efficient manner, assisting with bringing a natural equilibrium back to <EM4>~mission(Location)</EM4>. Access to combat equipment, transport, and a familiarity with wild and unpredictable animals are all required for this job.

For further details on the targeted creatures, please refer to <EM4>"The Guide to Stanton Wildlife"</EM4> in your Journal.

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager

title: Cargo Hauling Opportunity with Ling Hauling
description:
Hi,  
 
This is Petra Ling, and I’m proud to offer you a new and exciting opportunity to partner with Ling Family Hauling. When my parents started this company, their goal was to provide fast and reliable courier deliveries around the greater Crusader area. It quickly became a success, and as our reputation grew, so did our operations.  
 
Now, under my stewardship, Ling Family Hauling is taking the next big step – cargo hauling. Demand for this new service is growing faster than I expected, and that’s great news for both of us.   
 
If you’ve ever wanted to be a hauler, then I can make your dreams come true. Best way to learn something is by doing it, and I’ve got a haul of <EM4>~mission(Item)</EM4> that needs to go from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.  

No prior experience is necessary, but here’s a few things to keep in mind. All pick-ups and deliveries must be done at a freight elevator or autoloaded. You will need a ship that can hold <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>, and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to move them around. 
 
Upon successful completion of this delivery, you will be promoted to a ‘trusted contractor’ status and more hauls will become available to you.     

 
Sincerely,  
Petra Ling  
Managing Director of Cargo Operations 
Ling Family Hauling 

 

 

 

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.

title: QV Breaker Station Mining Rights (Exclusive)
description:
CONTRACT: Mining Rights Transfer
LOCATION: Nyx

DETAILS:
Shubin Interstellar prospectors have recently discovered the location of an abandoned QV Planetary Service Breaker Station near the Keeger belt. These stations were originally used by the defunct company to harvest valuable resources from inside asteroids but knowledge of their exact locations has been lost over the years. 

While this particular station is offline, our scout team believes that it could be made functional again with the necessary repairs. Additionally, if it was brought back online, there's already a resource-heavy asteroid in place ready to be cracked by the station's mining laser. 

Unfortunately, with all the various challenges that come with operating in Nyx, Shubin doesn't currently have the available bandwidth to handle the aforementioned repairs ourselves. This however has created an opportunity for an interested independent mining operation such as yourself. 

<EM4>TERMS*: </EM4>
We are making available the <EM4>exclusive mining rights</EM4> to this QV Breaker Station. Upon purchase, we will provide the coordinates of the station to only you and your crew. Your team will then be free to head there with a <EM4>mining vessel</EM4>, restore the <EM4>station's mining laser</EM4> to an operational status, crack the asteroid, and <EM4>harvest the resources</EM4> inside. 

Please note that while we guarantee that these coordinates will be exclusive to you, we cannot assure that other interested parties, such as outlaws, may not discover the station's location on their own. Caution is advised. 

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

title: UWC'S HIRING REFUELERS
description:
Hey!

DD from the United Wayfarers Club here.

The UWC offers repair, rearming and refuelling services across the UEE. It just so happens that we're on the look-out for new affiliates whose ships are fitted for refuelling. If you've got the fuel pods and like it when people are pleased to see you, the UWC might be the club for you.

And if you think it might be, I've got a live beacon you might like.

If you do happen to like it, a word to the wise: <EM4>make sure your fuel pods are full before you head out</EM4>.

A Club member has run out of fuel at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. I'm not sure on the details, like how they ended up out there with no Go Juice, but the UWC doesn't like to leave folk hanging.

The client vessel will pay you at the rate of <EM4>~mission(FuelRate) aUEC per SCU of Hydrogen</EM4> and  <EM4>~mission(QTFuelRate) aUEC per SCU of Quantum </EM4>. As a United Wayfarers Club contractor, you will also qualify for the UWC service fee listed above upon completion.

It's a straightforward run. Perfect if you want to get a feel for this kind of job. Get out there, fill up the tanks of their <EM4>~mission(Ship)</EM4> and get them on their way. Do enough runs like this, and the process becomes muscle memory. Until then, there's a <EM4>journal entry</EM4> on your mobiGlas called ""Refueling Protocols"" that covers the basics.

There have been no reports of outlaw activity in that sector, but stay alert. I always recommend you aim for a fast turnaround. The sooner you're done, the sooner I can fix you up with another contract. UWC's always looking for new affiliates. 

Looking forward to working with you.

Dina Deloit
Dispatch Hub
United Wayfarers Club
"We’ve got your back"
name: ContractGenerator.UnitedWayfarersClub

title: A Chance to Impress
description:
Firstly, allow me to introduce myself. To put it rather dramatically, I deal in lives. 

People hire me when some soul needs to be extinguished, and I in return employ the perfect person to serve as the extinguishant. This provides security to all parties involved as none know the identity of the other. An ideal situation as far as these things go.

I was recently made aware that you may possess skills that would make you of service to me and decided that it would be worthwhile to pursue the validity of this claim. 
 
If you have any interest in forging a working relationship, I will need a demonstration of said skills. 

Seek out and discreetly kill ~mission(TargetName) over at ~mission(Location|Address).

Do so successfully and you will be rewarded. Not only that, but you will have proven yourself worthy of further consideration.

Sincerely,
Vaughn

title: They Will Be Missed
description:
A security officer by the name of ~mission(TargetName) is in desperate need of an early retirement. They are currently stationed at ~mission(Location|Address) along with a host of other eager types in uniforms. 

Feel free to indulge your violent whims, but it is only the death of ~mission(TargetName) which will earn you my credit and thanks.

Earnestly,
Vaughn

title: Alliance Aid: Treatment Cargo Haul - Small Scale
description:
Hi,

We’ve joined the effort to help those affected by the Molina mold outbreak. There’s a small scale haul of urgently needed treatment waiting to be picked up from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and delivered to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Any chance you’re available?  
   
All you’ll need is a ship that can fit <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to make moving the stuff easier on you. 
 

Safe Hauling,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator
Ling Family Hauling

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.

title: Strategic Detatrine Reserve – Small Resupply
description:
Following the brutal attack on Pyro and our efforts to combat the vigilante group the Frontier Fighters, our strategic reserves across the system are at an all-time low. Citizens for Prosperity are eager to replenish our stocks before we reach a point of desperation. 

To that end, we were hoping that you would be able to resupply<EM4> ~mission(Destination|Address) with detatrine. </EM4>

This rare chemical compound is a key ingredient in several vital medical supplies, so it is important that replace what we used up treating local civilians and CFP members injured in the wake of the Frontier Fighter assault.

Normally we would direct you to reputable sources to acquire detatrine, but our contacts have informed us that several <EM4>depots</EM4> around the system have suddenly decided to sell the chemical at a significantly reduced price. In fact, it’s inexpensive enough that I suspect it will draw some unwanted attention. If you decide to seek out this potentially deadly deal, please do so with caution.

Your support of our efforts is much appreciated,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
